batches.batch_description: P1 Entity 字段 + 双前缀全局清理 + 前端 API 路径对齐

fixes.change: email 字段添加 @TableField(exist = false) 注解，排除 MyBatis-Plus 持久化映射。sys_dept 表无 email 列，最小改动避免 INSERT/UPDATE 失败。

移除 4 个 Controller 的 /v1/ 双前缀：(1) InventoryController: {"/inventory","/v1/inventory"}→"/inventory"；(2) RetirementController: {"/v1/retirement","/retirement"}→"/retirement"；(3) AuditDashboardController: {"/audit-logs","/v1/audit-log","/v1/audit"}→"/audit-logs"；(4) WorkOrderController: {"/workorders","/work-orders","/v1/workorders","/v1/work-orders"}→{"/workorders","/work-orders"}
